creator: avg@icyb.net.ua
text:
on 23/02/2009 22:10 Edwin Groothuis said the following:
> Maintainer of deskutils/gxmessage,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/132022 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132022
> 

Please go ahead with this patch.
I haven't been actually using gxmessage recently, so, Edmondas, if you
would be interested I would gladly offer you maintainer-ship of this
port :-)

-- 
Andriy Gapon
